title: anchusa ochroleuca
intro: Anchusa ochroleuca, also known as White Alkanet, is a perennial plant species belonging to the borage family (Boraginaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of White Alkanet include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity, making it useful in treating various skin conditions and infections. White Alkanet is typically prepared as a tincture or infused oil, and it is also used as a food coloring due to its vibrant blue color, which is obtained from its roots.
